title: Personal Financial Counseling - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 23 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness AFRICAN AMERICAN ALLIANCE FOR HOMEOWNERSHIP HOME PURCHASE COUNSELING AND FORECLOSURE PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides counseling on the topics of mortgage delinquency, foreclosure prevention, loss mitigation, and default resolution. Offers home-buying education and pre-purchase counseling, as well as financial planning guidance and an Individual Development Account (IDA) program. 825 NE 20th Avenue Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted; IDA program is limited to current program participants Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, counseling by appointment only Email (503) 595-3517 Get Directions Visit Website More Details APPRISEN FINANCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive financial counseling services including: -Budget and debt management -Debt repayment strategies -HUD-approved mortgage, delinquency, and default resolution consolidation -Home purchase guidance -Bankruptcy counseling and post-bankruptcy counseling -Student loan counseling 700 Taylor Road Suite 150 Gahanna, OH 43230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 5am-4pm, Friday 5am-3pm Email (888) 461-2927 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CARECONNECT USA HELPLINES FOR FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides multiple helplines where people can speak with experts and get connected to resources for financial issues, including bankruptcy, credit score improvement, foreclosure, mortgage default and delinquency, and debt management for student loans, credit cards, medical bills, and tax-related debt. 2019 Sandy Pond Lane Waxhaw, NC 28173 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 734-2585 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY BANK FINANCIAL LITERACY AND COACHING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial literacy workshops on budgeting, responsible use of credit and debt, financial recovery, and identity protection. Also offers one-on-one financial coaching. 38975 Proctor Boulevard Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 668-2560 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONSUMER CREDIT COUNSELING SERVICE OF SOUTHERN OREGON INC PERSONAL FINANCIAL COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial counseling, pre or post-purchase counseling and education, and reverse mortgage counseling. 820 Crater Lake Avenue Suite 202 Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted, except for reverse mortgage counseling where the homeowner must be age 62 or older with sizable equity in their home Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (541) 779-2273 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DEVNW DEVNW CORVALLIS FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides classes, workshops, and one-on-one counseling in the areas of homeownership and personal finance. NeighborWorks Homeownership Center offers HUD-certified homeownership counseling and foreclosure avoidance counseling. Also provides one-on-one financial counseling and student debt counseling. 2525 SE Third Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (541) 752-7220 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DEVNW DEVNW OREGON CITY FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides classes, workshops, and one-on-one counseling in the areas of homeownership and personal finance. NeighborWorks Homeownership Center offers HUD-certified homeownership counseling and foreclosure avoidance counseling. Also provides one-on-one financial counseling and student debt counseling. 421 High Street Suite 110 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (503) 655-8974 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DEVNW DEVNW SALEM FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides classes, workshops, and one-on-one counseling in the areas of homeownership and personal finance. NeighborWorks Homeownership Center offers HUD-certified homeownership counseling and foreclosure avoidance counseling. Also provides one-on-one financial counseling and student debt counseling. 528 Cottage Street NE Suite 1C Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (503) 779-2680 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DEVNW DEVNW SPRINGFIELD FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides classes, workshops, and one-on-one counseling in the areas of homeownership and personal finance. NeighborWorks Homeownership Center offers HUD-certified homeownership counseling and foreclosure avoidance counseling. Also provides one-on-one financial counseling and student debt counseling. 212 Main Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (541) 345-7106 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF LANE AND SOUTH COAST COUNTIES GOODWILL WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT PROSPERITY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Goodwill offers assistance with money management, debt reduction, budget planning, and connections to community support programs and financial services. Also offers employment-focused Individual Development Accounts (IDA), which include financial education courses and five to one savings matching opportunities for post-secondary education, transportation to employment, assistive technology such as mobility aids, dental work, and hearing aids, emergency savings, and debt reduction. 855 Seneca Road Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 431-3307 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING WORKS BEND SATELITE OFFICE PATHWORKS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides one-on-one coaching aimed at increasing earned income and financial literacy to make progress toward economic independence and self-sufficiency. Goal-oriented coaching sessions may focus on employment, education, home ownership, small business development, health, etc. Also offers an excrow savings program and Individual Development Account program. 1475 NE Forbes Drive Suite 110 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Must hold current Housing Choice Voucher Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 923-1018 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING WORKS PATHWORKS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides one-on-one coaching aimed at increasing earned income and financial literacy to make progress toward economic independence and self-sufficiency. Goal-oriented coaching sessions may focus on employment, education, home ownership, small business development, health, etc. Also offers an excrow savings program and Individual Development Account program. 405 SW 6th Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Must hold current Housing Choice Voucher Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 923-1018 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JEFFERSON COUNTY FAITH BASED NETWORK LINC MADRAS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides household goods, budgeting, job, and life skills mentoring, and connections to local food banks and community meals. May also assist with rent, electric, and propane vouchers when available. Assistance is limited and not guaranteed. Utility assistance is available once per year. 278 SE 8th Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Wednesday 10am-2pm Email (541) 475-4446 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH HOUSING AUTHORITY HOMEPATH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial coaching services with information about identifying short and long term financial goals, set spending plans, Individual Development Accounts (IDA), and budget management. Also provides a First Time Home Buyer Program which can help answer questions about the the home buying process, first time home buyer loan programs, building credit scores, and resolving challenges that may prevent homeownership. Also provides a series of workshops around the topics of financial fitness, home buying, Ready to Rent, foreclosure prevention, and default counseling. 1445 Avalon Street Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Thursday 9am-5pm Email (541) 884-0649 121 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH WORKS JOB CONNECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides job training, individualized career and life coaching, personal finance and life skills education, job placement, and work experience opportunities. Works with the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act (WIOA) program. Also provides job placement and support for ex-offenders in addition to a welfare to work program. 1930 S 6th Street Klamath Falls, OR 976013370 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 887-8495 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY LIFE SKILLS AND ONE-ON-ONE MENTORING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Classroom and mentoring program teaching budgeting, life skills, job preparation, parenting skills, and Bible study. Resource incentives may be provided for those successfully participating in the program. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 650-0153 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MONEY MANAGEMENT INTERNATIONAL DEBT AND CREDIT COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers credit counseling and debt repayment counseling. -Credit Counseling: A certified credit counselor meets with the client to review and evaluate the client's current financial situation; develop strategies to manage creditor payments as part of a balanced budget; evaluate personal financial goals; and create an action plan. -Debt Management Program: Offers the implementation of a structured debt management plan (DMP) to pay off debt. Negotiates with the client's creditors for reduced fees and interest for the term of the program. The client makes one monthly payment to the program administrator, which electronically disburses the funds to each creditor. The program continues until the debt is completely paid off. Includes follow-up visits. 12603 SW Freeway Suite 450 Stafford, TX 77477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (866) 889-9347 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL FOUNDATION FOR CREDIT COUNSELING CREDIT COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers financial reviews and education in person, over the phone, or online. Services include: -Credit and debt counseling -Bankruptcy counseling -Housing counseling (pre-purchase, foreclosure prevention, and reverse mortgage) -Student loan debt counseling -Debt management plans -Credit report reviews -Foreclosure information -Tips for first-time veteran and military homebuyers 2033 K Street NW Suite 425 Washington, DC 20006 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 5am-2pm Email (800) 388-2227 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON CASCADES WEST COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS ALBANY OFFICE STAND BY ME Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF One-on-one financial coaching to set financial goals and make individualized plans to achieve those goals. Financial coaches can provide encouragement; help with the basics of personal finance; assist, develop, and maintain healthy financial habits; offer credit counseling; provide accountability tools; and connect clients with resources and experts. 1400 Queen Avenue SE Suite 201 Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 924-8440 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE CREDIT UNION FINANCIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial wellness webinars, workshops, one-on-one coaching, and a wide range of online resources. These financial education resources will benefit all ages on topics including money management, savings, responsible credit use, debt repayment and homeownership. 4800 SW Research Way Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5:30pm, Friday 9am-6pm Email (800) 732-0173 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT INITIATIVES INC HOMEBUYER EDUCATION AND COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a program designed to help first-time home buyers access and maintain stable homeownership. Services include individualized pre-purchase counseling, group home buyer education, financial fitness certification, and post-purchase support. Also includes information on financial wellness and Individual Development Accounts(IDAs). Prospective clients must agree to attend orientation sessions. 6329 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Low and moderate-income households Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 288-2923 134 Get Directions Visit Website More Details STRENGTHENING RURAL FAMILIES FINANCIAL COACHING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Free one-on-one or virtual financial coaching to set financial goals and make individualized plans to achieve those goals. Financial coaches can provide encouragement, help with the basics of personal finance, assist in developing and maintaining healthy financial habits, provide accountability, and connect clients with resources and experts. 535 S 19th Street Room 162 Philomath, OR 97370 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Email (541) 929-2535 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WARM SPRINGS COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM HUD APPROVED FINANCIAL AND HOMEOWNERSHIP COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers HUD approved financial, credit, rental, and homeownership, counseling and coaching services. 1136 Paiute Avenue Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: People who live, work, or have addresses on the Warm Springs Indian Reservation Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Counseling by appointment only Email (541) 553-3148 Get Directions Visit Website More Details AFRICAN AMERICAN ALLIANCE FOR HOMEOWNERSHIP HOME PURCHASE COUNSELING AND FORECLOSURE PREVENTION CLACKAMAS COUNTY BANK FINANCIAL LITERACY AND COACHING CONSUMER CREDIT COUNSELING SERVICE OF SOUTHERN OREGON INC PERSONAL FINANCIAL COUNSELING DEVNW FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES DEVNW FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES DEVNW FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES DEVNW FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF LANE AND SOUTH COAST COUNTIES PROSPERITY PROGRAM HOUSING WORKS PATHWORKS PROGRAM HOUSING WORKS PATHWORKS PROGRAM JEFFERSON COUNTY FAITH BASED NETWORK LINC MADRAS KLAMATH HOUSING AUTHORITY HOMEPATH PROGRAM KLAMATH WORKS JOB CONNECTION OREGON CASCADES WEST COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS STAND BY ME OREGON STATE CREDIT UNION FINANCIAL EDUCATION PORTLAND COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT INITIATIVES INC HOMEBUYER EDUCATION AND COUNSELING STRENGTHENING RURAL FAMILIES FINANCIAL COACHING WARM SPRINGS COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM HUD APPROVED FINANCIAL AND HOMEOWNERSHIP COUNSELING
